title: Studio Director
mission: Own the creative vision, production scope, fun thesis, and final go/no-go.

title: Game Designer
mission: Turn the prompt into mechanics, loops, controls, levels, progression, and player motivation.

title: Technical Architect
mission: Choose engine constraints, repo shape, data flow, runtime risks, and prototype boundaries.

title: Art Director
mission: Define visual identity, asset style, generation prompts, source rules, and acceptance gates.

title: Advanced Player
mission: Stress-test fun, difficulty, mastery, retention, spectator clarity, and exploit risk.

title: QA Director
mission: Create automated checks, headed playtest gates, regression paths, and acceptance reports.

title: Platform Producer
mission: Map PC, Steam test, Unity, Godot, mobile, and console readiness without premature publishing.

title: Build Sentinel
mission: Serialize heavy builds, protect local processes, and record build artifacts when engine lanes arrive.
